summary: validate_index.py opens config TOML as the DB — 'file is not a database' error

resolution.note: Drop the CONFIG_PATH arg so VectorStore() defaults to data/guru.db. Reclassified bug→chore: the bug is a one-line wrong-path-arg, not behavioral logic, and validate_index.py has no automated test target (depends on live Ollama for the spot-check). Verified manually — all 4 checks pass post-fix.
